creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for Matthew for providing a core with INVARIANTS.  I have a guess
here.  Not 100% sure this is the root cause, but > 50% sure.

All who are affected, please patch your systems with patch from the above
attachment and let's see how it goes.  Running with INVARIANTS and patch
is also recommended, so that if system panics again, there will be more
information in the core.

Thanks and sorry for being slow on this.
